answer:
<think> The Hozier album containing a song that reached #2 on the Irish Singles Chart is "Take Me to Church." To find the global release date of this album, I need to look up the album's title and the year it was released. </think>

<answer> The album "Hozier" was released globally on September 19, 2014. </answer>
